task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N070 business-rule-extraction artifact. The ground truth is at: 业务规则清单.csv (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.业务规则清单.csv:
rule_id,domain,title,rule_semantic,hardness,object_or_scope,applicable_subject,condition_text,condition_expr,action,failure_result,exception_or_escalation,depends_on,negative_examples,lifecycle,decision_refs,blocker_refs,open_question_refs,certainty,evidence
RULE-cinemaai-001,access-control,Only verified production studios may create new anime projects,compliance,constraint,project,studio-admin,"Studio must have completed KYC verification and hold active 'PROD_STUDIO' role in Identity Registry","{'AND': [{'eq': ['studio.status', 'VERIFIED']}, {'eq': ['studio.role', 'PROD_STUDIO']}]}","Create project","Project creation denied with HTTP 403","Escalate to Compliance Ops for manual review; log violation to audit trail",["OBJ-studio-002","PERM-access-011"],["Unverified studio attempts to create project → returns 403","Studio with 'BASIC_USER' role submits project → fails with role mismatch","KYC pending studio uploads script → blocked before ingestion"],"active","REQ-AC-027","SM-project-003","[Q-001] Is 'VERIFIED' status sufficient or must it include active insurance certificate?","明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§3.2.1.L12-L15"
RULE-cinemaai-002,media-processing,All uploaded scripts must be scanned for copyright-infringing phrases before ingestion,temporal,constraint,script,ingestion-service,"Script file is received and not yet processed","{'eq': ['script.state', 'UPLOADED']}","Scan script using NLP model v3.2 + licensed phrase DB","Reject script with error code SCRIPT_COPYRIGHT_VIOLATION","Auto-notify legal team; quarantine file; trigger human review workflow",["OBJ-script-005","CFG-model-007"],["Script containing verbatim dialogue from 'Attack on Titan' S3E5 ingested → must fail","Script with paraphrased but substantively identical scene description ingested → must fail","Script with fair-use academic citation block ingested → should pass (but current model flags)"],"active","REQ-MP-041","SM-script-008","[Q-002] Does 'licensed phrase DB' include jurisdiction-specific exceptions (e.g., Japan's Article 33-2)?","明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§4.5.3.L8-L12"
RULE-cinemaai-003,rendering-scheduling,Rendering jobs exceeding 4h wall-clock time must auto-pause and require manual approval before resuming,idempotency,constraint,render-job,render-orchestrator,"Job runtime exceeds 4 hours AND job state is 'RUNNING'","{'AND': [{'gt': ['job.runtime_seconds', 14400]}, {'eq': ['job.state', 'RUNNING']}]}","Pause job; emit PAUSE_LONG_RUNTIME event","Job enters 'PAUSED' state; no further GPU allocation","Notify assigned producer via Slack; require /approve_resume command within 24h",["CFG-timeout-019","PERM-approval-033"],["Job at 4h01m resumes without approval → violates constraint","Same job ID submitted twice with identical payload → second submission ignored (idempotent)","Same job ID submitted with updated render settings → must reject with CONFLICT and prompt diff review"],"active","REQ-RS-066","SM-render-012","[Q-003] Is the 4h threshold configurable per studio tier?","基于上下文推断","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§5.7.2.L3-L7; [CinemaAI-PRD-v0.3]§Appendix-B.L22-L25"
RULE-cinemaai-004,voice-generation,Each voice actor profile may be assigned to no more than 3 concurrent speaking roles across all active projects,concurrency,constraint,voice-actor,voice-assignment-service,"Actor is assigned to ≥3 roles AND new assignment request arrives","{'gte': ['actor.concurrent_role_count', 3]}","Reject assignment with code ACTOR_ROLE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED","Return 429 Too Many Requests","Queue request for retry after 15m; notify casting director","["OBJ-actor-008","SM-actor-015"],["Actor assigned to 3 roles receives 4th request → rejected","Actor with 2 roles + 1 pending approval receives request → counts as 3, rejects","Actor with 3 roles in Project A and 1 in archived Project B → archived roles excluded (correct)"],"active","REQ-VO-052","SM-actor-015","[Q-004] Does 'concurrent' include roles in 'DRAFT' or only 'ACTIVE' projects?","待确认","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§6.1.4.L1-L4"
RULE-cinemaai-005,subtitle-sync,Subtitle timestamps must not overlap within a single video segment; overlapping segments must be resolved before publishing,compliance,constraint,subtitle-segment,subtitle-validator,"Two or more subtitle segments in same video segment have intersecting time ranges","{'exists': [{'overlap': ['segment.start_ms', 'segment.end_ms', 'other_segment.start_ms', 'other_segment.end_ms']}]}","Flag segment group as INVALID","Publish disabled for entire video; UI shows conflict warning","Auto-generate resolution suggestion (shift later segment); require editor confirmation","["OBJ-video-011","CFG-tolerance-022"],["Segments [00:12.3–00:15.7] and [00:14.1–00:18.2] published → must block","Segments [00:12.3–00:15.7] and [00:15.7–00:18.2] (abut) → allowed","Segments [00:12.3–00:15.7] and [00:15.701–00:18.2] (1ms gap) → allowed per tolerance config"],"active","REQ-SUB-077","SM-video-021","[Q-005] Is the 1ms tolerance globally fixed or per-language?","明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§7.3.5.L10-L13"
RULE-cinemaai-006,ai-directing,Scene-level AI direction prompts must contain at least one explicit emotional descriptor (e.g., 'melancholic', 'frenetic') and one spatial anchor (e.g., 'close-up', 'wide shot'),business,rule,scene-prompt,ai-director-engine,"Prompt string lacks ≥1 emotional descriptor OR lacks ≥1 spatial anchor","{'OR': [{'not': {'in': ['prompt.tokens', ['melancholic', 'frenetic', 'serene', 'tense', 'joyful', 'grieving']]}}}, {'not': {'in': ['prompt.tokens', ['close-up', 'wide shot', 'over-the-shoulder', 'Dutch angle', 'aerial view']]}}]}","Reject prompt generation","Return 400 with missing_token_type field","Log to Prompt Quality Dashboard; suggest token library","["CFG-prompt-028","OBJ-token-031"],["Prompt: 'Character walks down street' → fails (no emotion, no anchor)","Prompt: 'Melancholic walk' → fails (has emotion, no anchor)","Prompt: 'Wide shot of serene character' → passes"],"active","REQ-AID-089","SM-scene-033","[Q-006] Are user-defined synonyms (e.g., 'sad' → 'melancholic') supported?","待确认","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§8.2.2.L5-L9"
RULE-cinemaai-007,asset-management,All VFX asset uploads must include EXIF metadata with camera model, lens, and capture timestamp; missing fields trigger quarantine,compliance,constraint,vfx-asset,ingestion-service,"Asset file has EXIF block AND any of [camera_model, lens, capture_timestamp] is empty or absent","{'AND': [{'has': ['asset.exif']}, {'OR': [{'not': {'has': ['asset.exif.camera_model']}}, {'not': {'has': ['asset.exif.lens']}}, {'not': {'has': ['asset.exif.capture_timestamp']}}]}]}","Quarantine asset; set state = 'EXIF_INCOMPLETE'","Asset inaccessible to editors; no preview generated","Auto-email asset owner with checklist; escalate to VFX Ops after 72h","["OBJ-asset-037","CFG-exif-044"],["RAW asset without EXIF → quarantined","EXIF present but missing lens field → quarantined","EXIF with camera_model='iPhone 14' and lens='Ultra Wide' but no timestamp → quarantined"],"active","REQ-AM-102","SM-asset-041","[Q-007] Is timestamp validation strict (ISO 8601) or lenient (epoch ms accepted)?","明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§9.4.1.L14-L18"
RULE-cinemaai-008,review-workflow,Any scene revision that modifies ≥30% of original frame pixels must trigger mandatory peer review before final approval,temporal,rule,scene-revision,revision-tracker,"Revision pixel delta ≥30% AND revision type is 'FRAME_MODIFICATION'","{'AND': [{'gte': ['revision.pixel_delta_percent', 30]}, {'eq': ['revision.type', 'FRAME_MODIFICATION']}]}","Enqueue for peer_review queue","Revision marked 'PENDING_PEER_REVIEW'; cannot be approved","Assign two reviewers from same domain expertise pool; SLA = 4 business hours","["CFG-delta-055","PERM-review-062"],["Revision with 29.9% pixel change bypasses review → allowed","Revision with 30.1% change submitted → triggers review queue","Revision with 35% change but type='AUDIO_MIX' → exempt"],"active","REQ-RW-115","SM-scene-033","[Q-008] Is pixel delta computed against original or last approved version?","基于上下文推断","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§10.6.3.L7-L11; [CinemaAI-PRD-v0.3]§4.8.L1-L3"
RULE-cinemaai-009,export-publishing,Export jobs for 4K+ resolution must use hardware-accelerated encoders only; software fallback is prohibited,compliance,constraint,export-job,export-controller,"Export resolution ≥3840x2160 AND encoder type ≠ 'HARDWARE_ACCEL'","{'AND': [{'gte': ['export.resolution_width', 3840]}, {'neq': ['export.encoder_type', 'HARDWARE_ACCEL']}]}","Abort export; return ERROR_HARDWARE_REQUIRED","Job fails with exit code 127","Alert encoding infra team; log encoder misconfiguration","["CFG-encoder-071","OBJ-hw-077"],["4K export configured with 'x264' software encoder → aborts","8K export with 'NVIDIA_NVENC' → succeeds","1080p export with 'x264' → allowed (no constraint applies)"],"active","REQ-EXP-129","SM-export-082","[Q-009] Does 'HARDWARE_ACCEL' include AMD AMF and Intel QSV, or NVIDIA NVENC only?","待确认","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§11.2.4.L1-L5"
RULE-cinemaai-010,audit-logging,All actions modifying 'character_emotion_state' in scene objects must generate an immutable audit record with actor ID, timestamp, and prior/next values,compliance,constraint,scene-object,scene-state-manager,"Field 'character_emotion_state' is modified in any scene object","{'eq': ['field_path', 'character_emotion_state']}","Write immutable audit log entry to AuditDB","No action blocked; but log write failure halts mutation","Retry log write 3×; if fails, alert SRE and halt all state writes","["OBJ-scene-088","CFG-audit-093"],["Emotion state changed from 'calm'→'angry' without audit log → violates constraint","Bulk update of 50 scenes changes emotion → 50 distinct audit records required","Log write timeout during high load → system enters safe mode (writes paused)"],"active","REQ-AUD-144","SM-scene-033","[Q-010] Is audit retention period (90d) enforced at write time or by TTL policy?","明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§12.1.1.L20-L24"
